{"id":"project-LICHEN-tl8x","title":"api.py: no validation of partition group node IDs","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/api.py
Lines: 460-474

add_chaos_partition does not validate that group items are strings:

    groups_raw = body.get('groups')
    ...
    groups = [set(group) for group in groups_raw]

A request with non-string node IDs like {"groups": [[1, 2], [3, 4]]} creates a PartitionRule with integer sets. Since node_id comparisons in _find_group use 'node_id in group' where node_id is always a string, the rule silently never matches anything.

Fix: Validate that all items in all groups are strings before creating the rule.

Impact: Minor - API accepts invalid input that silently fails; no security impact.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:28.165197Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:28.165233Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-tl8x","title":"api.py: no validation of partition group node IDs","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/api.py
Lines: 460-474

add_chaos_partition does not validate that group items are strings:

    groups_raw = body.get('groups')
    ...
    groups = [set(group) for group in groups_raw]

A request with non-string node IDs like {"groups": [[1, 2], [3, 4]]} creates a PartitionRule with integer sets. Since node_id comparisons in _find_group use 'node_id in group' where node_id is always a string, the rule silently never matches anything.

Fix: Validate that all items in all groups are strings before creating the rule.

Impact: Minor - API accepts invalid input that silently fails; no security impact.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:28.165197Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:38:48.502614974Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:38:48.502614974Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:43:48.502614974Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:38:48.502614974Z"}
